name: codebase-impact warns when a candidate rule matches 0 files (likely shallow or stale)
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: X
  authoritative_url: https://example.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules:
  - id: rare
    name: rare
    description: x
    detector: bash -c "grep -l NEVER_MATCHES"
' > rule.yaml
